title: Validate and repair decomposed V5.10 runner
goal: Run smoke tests and normal runner startup after the V5.10 runner cleanup, then fix all import, test and startup errors without reverting to the old monolithic runner.
must_preserve: python runner.py --config-path config --config-name runner launch command
optimizer param group semantics unless a traceback proves a change is required
do_not_do: Do not restore the old monolithic src/apps/runner.py
Do not delete extracted helper modules
Do not hide errors by skipping smoke tests
Do not import MuJoCo/Open3D/PyQt at helper-module import time unless unavoidable
likely_failure_areas: Import cycles between runner.py, runner_entry.py, runner_patches.py, runner_unified_init.py and runner_system_factory.py
Duplicate ModuleDebugStatusServer or IPCControlServer startup causing port binding errors
Startup/runtime state being overwritten in the wrong order
Model initialization order around speech vocab, v23 config, model, optimizer, inner object, self core, checkpoint load and optimizer rebuild
Smoke tests that still assume old patch-only runner behavior
success_criteria: python runner.py --config-path config --config-name runner starts normally or fails only at a clearly documented environment limitation
src/apps/runner.py remains a slim compatibility wrapper
